overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from a cyberpunk open-world game, showing a walk across an elevated bridge toward a distinctive neon-lit pyramid building. A flying vehicle with searchlights hovers overhead before departing, and the scene ends as the player approaches pedestrians resting on the bridge railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with neon pyramid landmark

events.description: flying vehicle begins ascending and moving toward the right, searchlights sweeping across the scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge walkway toward the illuminated pyramid building

notable_agents.action: aerial vehicle hovering with bright searchlights, then ascending and departing to the right

entered.detail: large pyramid-shaped structure with glowing green geometric neon lines and glass facade
concrete barrier with metal railings along the walkway edge
silhouetted palm trees in front of the pyramid building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic bridge at night, dominated by a massive neon-lit pyramid building on the left. A flying vehicle hovers overhead with sweeping searchlights, then begins to ascend and move away to the right as the camera walks forward along the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge approaching pyramid structure

events.description: scene darkens slightly as the aerial vehicle's searchlights move out of frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge walkway, now in darker lighting without the vehicle's spotlights

segments.scene_description: The flying vehicle has departed, leaving the scene darker and quieter. The camera continues walking forward along the bridge, with the neon pyramid building remaining prominent on the left and the bridge railing visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with pedestrians on railing

events.description: two pedestrians come into view resting on the bridge railing to the left

agents.ego_description: approaching two individuals resting on the bridge railing while maintaining forward movement

notable_agents.action: two individuals resting on the bridge railing, one sitting and one standing, overlooking the city below

entered.detail: large structural column of the bridge where the pedestrians are resting

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking, two pedestrians come into view on the left side, resting against the bridge railing near a support column. The neon pyramid remains visible ahead while the camera approaches these stationary figures in the final moments of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a futuristic nighttime bridge that shifts from a scene of high-tech surveillance to a quiet urban encounter. It begins with a massive neon-lit pyramid dominating the left skyline while a flying vehicle hovers overhead, casting sweeping searchlights across the concrete walkway. As the vehicle ascends and departs to the right, the environment grows darker and quieter, leaving the camera to advance steadily with the glowing pyramid remaining a constant landmark. The scene then opens up to reveal two pedestrians resting against the bridge railing near a support column, before the camera finally closes the distance toward these stationary figures.
